holdings.infoBox: RW is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 11.86%, Loar Holdings at 6.90%, Diploma at 6.86%, HEICO at 6.42%, and Berkshire Hathaway at 4.95%.

overview.description: The Rainwater Equity ETF (RW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in a concentrated portfolio of equity securities, primarily mid- and large-cap in developed markets. Stocks are selected based on fundamental criteria and weighted based on analyst conviction RW was launched on Jun 17, 2025 and is issued by Rainwater.

data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Rainwater Equity LLC today announced the launch of the Rainwater Equity ETF (NYSE: RW) — a purpose-built investment solution for financial advisors seeking long-term, tax...
